title: Family vault cleanup — orphan nodes and stale links
summary: Quarterly review of the family vault: 12 orphan nodes, 6 broken wikilinks, and 3 MOCs that drifted from their domain.
body_html:
Vault cleanup pass

Walked the entire family vault tonight. Found 12 orphan nodes (no inbound or outbound links), 6 broken wikilinks pointing at notes that no longer exist, and 3 MOCs whose domain frontmatter doesn't match the cluster they actually live in. Below is the recommended cleanup, in priority order.

Orphan nodes

Orphans aren't inherently bad — some are intentional standalone references — but a few of these look like drafts that were never wired up.

  • school/dance-recital-spring-2025.md — likely safe to archive, no other notes mention it
  • finances/old-credit-union.md — predates the move, should probably move to archive/
  • health/pediatrician-search-shortlist.md — superseded by health/dr-naaz.md
  • household/contractor-bids-deck.md — orphan because the deck moved to Drive; the markdown stub is no longer needed

Broken wikilinks

Six links point at notes that don't exist. The most recent ones look like typos:

  • [[boris-eye-doctor]] in health/family-providers.md — should be [[dr-eye-boris]]
  • [[pickle-vaccines-2025]] in health/pickle.md — note was renamed to pickle-immunizations.md
  • [[meal-plan-template]] in food/meal-planning.md — note exists but in food/templates/

MOC drift

Three Maps of Content claim to belong to one domain in their frontmatter but most of their inbound links come from another. This usually means the MOC outgrew its original purpose and should either split or move.

  1. school/pip-academic-progress.md — declared school, but 70% of inbound links are from health notes about her ADHD assessment. Recommend splitting.
  2. finances/family-budget.md — declared finances, but increasingly referenced from household notes about renovation cost tracking. Worth a separate household/renovation-budget.md branching off.
  3. people/extended-family.md — declared people, but the contents are almost all school (grandparents picking Pip up, cousin coordination). Consider renaming.

Recommendation

Do the broken wikilinks tonight (5-minute fix), the orphan archive pass this weekend (15 minutes), and the MOC drift conversation at next Sunday's family cabinet meeting. The MOC reorganizations will affect how I draft future reports, so we should agree on the new shape together rather than me silently restructuring.
